## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics show mixed results: impressions stabilizing, clicks declining slightly](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Tuning pages showing steady improvement, with 2 pages outperforming others](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Vendor pages recently launched, showing initial impressions](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Workflow for existing categories maintained; new process to be discussed for upcoming categories](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Impressions stabilizing, clicks declining slightly across most pages](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Office leasing page: high-volume but potentially irrelevant traffic (local SEO queries)](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [23% week-over-week position loss, but not deemed critical yet due to fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Most pages lost minimal clicks; monitoring for further decline](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Tuning Pages Performance

  - [Second batch: Slower improvement than expected](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [Impressions and rankings increasing](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [3 pages missing meta descriptions (GrowthX to update)](https://fathom.video/share/KsssBTmMCrUiRrB2FPnBMJmC4R_EyVWz?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
